tasks.instruction: Przeczytaj ponizszy tekst. Uzupelnij kazda luke (1.1-1.10) jednym slowem, tak aby powstal spojny i poprawny logicznie oraz gramatycznie tekst.
tasks.text:
Space exploration has captured the human imagination for centuries, but it was not 1.1. _________ the 20th century that it became a reality. The Space Age began in 1957, when the Soviet Union launched Sputnik 1, the world's first artificial satellite, 1.2. _________ in a new era of scientific discovery. Four years later, Yuri Gagarin became the first human being to travel into space, completing a full orbit of the Earth in just 108 minutes.

The 1960s brought one of the most remarkable achievements in human history: the Moon landing. On 20 July 1969, astronaut Neil Armstrong became the first person to set 1.3. _________ on the lunar surface, famously declaring that it was 'one small step for man, one giant 1.4. _________ for mankind'. The Apollo programme came to 1.5. _________ in 1972 after six successful Moon landings.

Since then, space exploration has taken many new 1.6. _________. Unmanned probes have been sent to explore distant planets, and the Hubble Space Telescope has provided breathtaking images of galaxies billions of light-years 1.7. _________ Earth. The International Space Station, continuously 1.8. _________ since 2000, serves as a platform for scientific research in the unique conditions of orbit.

Today, private companies 1.9. _________ as SpaceX and Blue Origin are playing an increasingly important role in the future of space travel, with ambitious plans to send humans to Mars 1.10. _________ the coming decades.
